heading: Academic year and summer term for page program
label: 4914 Academic year and summer term for page program
text: The page program shall consist of the two semesters of the academic year, plus a non-academic summer term.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 88c–2 of this titleSection is based on section 2 of House Resolution No. 234, Ninety-eighth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .June 29, 1983Pub. L. 98–367
Amendments1996— substituted “semesters of the academic year, plus a non-academic” for “terms of the academic year plus a”.Pub. L. 104–186
